title: C Values, Integer Conversions, and Size Arithmetic · Failure Case: Integer Promotions Conversions
summary: A binary record parser receives attacker-controlled counts that cross signedness and multiplication boundaries before allocation. Planned artifact: Add and verify the cmem integer promotions conversions increment in checked size and conversion policy. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Trace integer promotions and usual arithmetic conversions before comparing, shifting, indexing, or sizing.

Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
